zimmer.name: zimmer
zimmer.description: The Zimmer orchestrator itself — self-hostable AI coding agent orchestration.

zimmer-router.name: zimmer-router
zimmer-router.description: Baseline router root: receives freeform quick-router / chat-bubble input and dispatches it to the right downstream session. It is the target of Session::ROUTER_AGENT_ROOT and is not user-invocable (it is invoked by the dashboard's quick router, not picked from the new-session form).

agent-orchestrator.name: agent-orchestrator
agent-orchestrator.description: The Zimmer orchestrator Rails app itself — models, controllers, jobs, services, views, migrations, tests.

agents.name: agents
agents.description: Harness artifacts that wire agent sessions: skills, agent-root definitions, MCP server registry, hooks, plugins, and references.

catalog-management.name: catalog-management
catalog-management.description: Lead root that fans out catalog-maintenance work to subagent phases (research, configs, proctor, save).

catalog-mgmt-research.name: catalog-mgmt-research
catalog-mgmt-research.description: Subagent phase (research) spawned by the catalog-management lead root.

catalog-mgmt-configs.name: catalog-mgmt-configs
catalog-mgmt-configs.description: Subagent phase (configs) spawned by the catalog-management lead root.

catalog-mgmt-proctor.name: catalog-mgmt-proctor
catalog-mgmt-proctor.description: Subagent phase (proctor) spawned by the catalog-management lead root.

catalog-mgmt-save.name: catalog-mgmt-save
catalog-mgmt-save.description: Subagent phase (save) spawned by the catalog-management lead root.

general-agent.name: general-agent
general-agent.description: Generic catch-all root for ad-hoc coding tasks with no dedicated root.

tadasant-internal.name: tadasant-internal
tadasant-internal.description: Private ops repo: Zimmer's production deployment layer (production tfvars, prod workflows, the mirrored Terraform module).
